name: External Disk/USB Storage Device Detected
description: Detects the connection of external disk drives or USB storage devices to a system. This can be an early indicator of data exfiltration or malware introduction attempts.

prompts.prompt: External disk or USB storage device connection detected. This activity could be an early indicator of data exfiltration or malware introduction. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}, **Message** {Message}. Investigate immediately for unauthorized device usage or potential threat actor activity.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for external storage device connection (e.g., 6416).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account associated with the device connection.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer where the device was connected.

parameters.name: Message
parameters.description: The event message, indicating the type of device (e.g., 'USB Mass Storage Device').
